background: The asthma survey considered in previous illustrative examples addresses a binomial random variable with n=20 and p=0.04. It follows that q=1-0.04=0.96.

task.query: Calculate the expected value of the binomial random variable.
task.answer: The expected value of this random variable μ=n p=20 ⋅ 0.04=0.8.

task.query: Calculate the variance and standard deviation of the binomial random variable.
task.answer: It has variance σ²=n p q= 20 ⋅ 0.04 ⋅ 0.96=0.768 and standard deviation σ=√(n p q)= √(20 ⋅ 0.04 ⋅ 0.96)=0.8764.

meta info.caption: Expected value and variance of a binomial random vari-able (Asthma survey).
